message:
🐛 Fix transparent backgrounds on dropdowns, panels, and cards (#1319)

Replace semi-transparent backgrounds (bg-*/20, bg-white/[0.02], bg-secondary/50)
with solid theme-aware equivalents across 23 component files.

backdrop-blur is globally disabled in index.css to prevent screen-sharing
flicker, which made these elements nearly invisible. Now using solid bg-card,
bg-secondary, and -900/-950 Tailwind shades for proper visibility.

Components fixed:
- AI panels (MissionSuggestions, InlineAIAssist, AiGenerationPanel)
- Dropdowns (ClusterFilter, ClusterSelect, SearchDropdown, UserProfile)
- Floating actions, Marketplace badges, Widget settings
- Card panels (GPU Monitor, Kagenti, LLM-d, Weather)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
